name: @engram/kernel-app
//: quickjs-wasi is a devDependency, NOT a dependency: worker-build 0.8.3 merges `dependencies` into the wasm-bindgen snippet package.json and then mis-parses it. esbuild resolves it from node_modules regardless. See docs/results/v0.md. v0.6: esbuild + the curated in-VM stdlib libs are ALSO devDependencies — they are bundled into src/stdlib.bundle.js at build time and shipped as a wrangler Text module; they are never imported by the worker itself.
